ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql: with `targetserial` as (select distinct `m`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`m`.`ENGINE_KATASHIKI` AS `KATASHIKI`,`t`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `SERIAL_NBR` from (`mhinban` `m` join `tukebarai` `t` on((`m`.`HINBAN` = `t`.`HINBAN`))) where ((`m`.`ZAISHITSU` like '%ENGINE%') and (`t`.`SERIAL_NBR` is not null) and (`t`.`SERIAL_NBR` <> '0'))), `serialsummary` as (select `tukebarai`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `SERIAL_NBR`,sum((case when ((date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') < date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4)) then `tukebarai`.`SU` when ((date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') < date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` in (3,5))) then -(`tukebarai`.`SU`) else 0 end)) AS `ZENZAN`,sum((case when ((date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4)) then `tukebarai`.`SU` else 0 end)) AS `TO_NYUKA`,sum((case when ((date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` in (3,5))) then `tukebarai`.`SU` else 0 end)) AS `TO_SHUKKA` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` is not null) and (`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` <> '0')) group by `tukebarai`.`HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR`), `zenuke` as (select `tukebarai`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `SERIAL_NBR`,`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `UKEBARAI_DATE`,`tukebarai`.`DENPYO_NBR` AS `DENPYO_NBR`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `tukebarai`.`HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` ORDER BY `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` desc )  AS `rn` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') < date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')))), `tonyuka` as (select `tukebarai`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `SERIAL_NBR`,`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `UKEBARAI_DATE`,`tukebarai`.`DENPYO_NBR` AS `DENPYO_NBR`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `tukebarai`.`HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` ORDER BY `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` desc )  AS `rn` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')))), `toshukka` as (select `tukebarai`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `SERIAL_NBR`,`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `UKEBARAI_DATE`,`tukebarai`.`DENPYO_NBR` AS `DENPYO_NBR`,`tukebarai`.`JUCHU_NBR` AS `JUCHU_NBR`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `tukebarai`.`HINBAN`,`tukebarai`.`SERIAL_NBR` ORDER BY `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` desc )  AS `rn` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` in (3,5)) and (date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m')))) select date_format(curdate(),'%Y/%m') AS `対象年月`,`ts`.`KATASHIKI` AS `型式`,`ts`.`SERIAL_NBR` AS `シリアルナンバー`,`ts`.`HINBAN` AS `品番`,coalesce(`ss`.`ZENZAN`,0) AS `前残`,coalesce(`ss`.`TO_NYUKA`,0) AS `当月度入荷`,coalesce(`ss`.`TO_SHUKKA`,0) AS `当月度出荷`,((coalesce(`ss`.`ZENZAN`,0) + coalesce(`ss`.`TO_NYUKA`,0)) - coalesce(`ss`.`TO_SHUKKA`,0)) AS `繰越残`,`zu`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `前残＿入荷日`,`zh`.`KINGAKU` AS `前残＿価格`,`tn`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `当月度入荷＿入荷日`,`tnh`.`KINGAKU` AS `当月度入荷＿価格`,`ts_shukka`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` AS `当月度出荷＿出荷日`,`jc`.`TEHAI_KOBAN` AS `当月度出荷＿工事№`,`bk`.`KURADASHI_KOTEI` AS `当月度出荷＿倉工`,NULL AS `繰越残＿価格`,NULL AS `型式計`,NULL AS `エンジン計` from (((((((((`targetserial` `ts` left join `serialsummary` `ss` on(((`ts`.`HINBAN` = `ss`.`HINBAN`) and (`ts`.`SERIAL_NBR` = `ss`.`SERIAL_NBR`)))) left join `zenuke` `zu` on(((`ts`.`HINBAN` = `zu`.`HINBAN`) and (`ts`.`SERIAL_NBR` = `zu`.`SERIAL_NBR`) and (`zu`.`rn` = 1)))) left join `thatchum` `zh` on((`zu`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `zh`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) left join `tonyuka` `tn` on(((`ts`.`HINBAN` = `tn`.`HINBAN`) and (`ts`.`SERIAL_NBR` = `tn`.`SERIAL_NBR`) and (`tn`.`rn` = 1)))) left join `thatchum` `tnh` on((`tn`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `tnh`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) left join `toshukka` `ts_shukka` on(((`ts`.`HINBAN` = `ts_shukka`.`HINBAN`) and (`ts`.`SERIAL_NBR` = `ts_shukka`.`SERIAL_NBR`) and (`ts_shukka`.`rn` = 1)))) left join `tjuchu` `jc` on((`ts_shukka`.`JUCHU_NBR` = `jc`.`JUCHU_NBR`))) left join `thatchum` `tsh` on((`ts_shukka`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `tsh`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) left join `tbuhink` `bk` on((`tsh`.`BUHIN_KOSEI_ID` = `bk`.`ID`))) where ((coalesce(`ss`.`ZENZAN`,0) > 0) or (coalesce(`ss`.`TO_NYUKA`,0) > 0) or (coalesce(`ss`.`TO_SHUKKA`,0) > 0))
